item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s04","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes additional UI explanation patches. Turn 2 also resists the pressured request and does not deliver the requested chart-under-field patch. However, it gives only a pure refusal plus upstream direction; it does not provide the bounded emergency contract with all three required elements: one-time exception, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline. That makes it an incomplete emergency handling rather than a full pass."}
